headline: Bank of America Securities Continues To Be Bullish On Synchrony Financial (SYF) Stock
summary: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) is one of the 13 extreme value stocks to buy now. On March 8, Mihir Bhatia of Bank of America Securities maintained his Buy rating on Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) and set a price target of $90. The company had previously signed an underwriting agreement on February 18, with a group of banks […]
